mechanism: Correlation flickering between positive and negative regimes creates ~200bp swings in 60/40 portfolio volatility, making short-duration IG (which avoids the correlation instability) relatively more attractive as a portfolio diversifier.
regime_dependence: Sharpe advantage is most pronounced during correlation instability. If correlation durably settles negative (as in 2000-2020), traditional 60/40 diversification restores and IG advantage narrows.
